name: Lighter Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 9-by-5-inch loaf pan with vegetable cooking spray. Line the bottom of the pan with wax paper and spray lightly again. Puree the bananas with the lemon juice.
2. Sift together the flour, baking powder, soda, salt, nutmeg, and cloves.
3. With an electric mixer, beat together the egg, egg whites, sugar, oil, and buttermilk on medium speed until well combined. Beat in the banana mixture.
4. Slowly add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, beating just until blended.
5. Transfer the batter to the prepared pan and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour. Test for doneness by inserting a toothpick into the center of the bread; it should come out clean when the bread is done.
6. Let cool in the pan for 5 minutes before unmolding. Cool on a rack before cutting.
14 servings; approximate preparation time 20 minutes.
